case_title: WILLIAM H. SIGMAN VS. UBER TECHNOLOGIES,INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-19-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR SIGMAN, WILLIAM H. ASSIGNED TO LEE, JAMES LEONARD D/B/A JUDGMENT RECOVERY SPECIALIST

ORDER ON SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER & ANSWER[FILED JUL-17-23. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. [RE: REQUEST FOR COURT TO ORDER UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC TO PAY] EXPLANATION FOR DECISION: PLAINTIFF PROPERLY ASSIGNED VALID JUDGMENT TO ASSIGNEE FOR COLLECTION.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
AMENDED AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,800.00 FILED BY SIGMAN, WILLIAM H. AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF AMENDING CLAIM/DEFENDANT'S NAME FROM UBER HC TO UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC AND TO INCLUDE AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIGMAN, WILLIAM H.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-14-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-14-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM H. SIGMAN IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ANSWER TO SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER [RE: REQUEST FOR COURT TO ORDER UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC TO PAY] FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIGMAN, WILLIAM H.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,800.00 FILED BY SIGMAN, WILLIAM H. AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-14-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIGMAN, WILLIAM H. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. $2,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,850.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER & ANSWER RE: REQUEST FOR COURT TO ORDER UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC TO PAY FILED BY ASSIGNEE LEE, JAMES LEONARD D/B/A JUDGMENT RECOVERY SPECIALIST AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
